creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi TAKAHASHI-san,

Thank you for sending your patch.

I've attached a shar file that fixes as follows:
1. make portlint happy
2. move pkg-message to files/pkg-message.in to describe in more detail

Please make sure it and let me know if you find something wrong with it.

I'm going to commit it after 8.1-RELEASE because the ports tree is now
in feature freeze.

Regards,
-- 
TAKATSU Tomonari
